advisories.detail: L_m [no-anchor] in def:design-objective — add a definitionv for the graph Laplacian L_m of the two-block graph and reference it from def:design-objective

L_m^\dagger [no-anchor] in def:design-objective — add an anchored definition of the Moore--Penrose inverse L_m^\dagger, or include it in the L_m definitionv, and reference it from def:design-objective
J_n [undefined] in def:design-objective — state in an anchored definition that J_n is the n by n all-ones matrix and reference it from def:design-objective

X(u,v) [undefined] in def:block-elliptope/prop:symmetry-reduction/lem:block-spectral-coordinates/lem:pm-reduced-slice-characterization — add a definitionv giving the entries of the block covariance matrix X(u,v) and reference it from all non-defining uses

X(P) [undefined] in def:implementable-covariance-class/def:implementability-gap/prop:symmetry-reduction/thm:cut-corner-exactness/thm:robust-corner-exactness — add a definitionv for the covariance map X(P), for example X(P)=E_P[ZZ^T], and reference it from each use

P^{\mathrm{orb}} [undefined] in prop:symmetry-reduction — add an anchored definition of the orbit-averaged assignment law P^{\mathrm{orb}} under the two-block automorphism group and reference it from prop:symmetry-reduction

X_{\mathrm{cut}} [undefined] in thm:cut-corner-exactness/lem:block-spectral-coordinates — add a definitionv for the cut covariance, e.g. X_{\mathrm{cut}}=X(1,-1), and reference it from thm:cut-corner-exactness
P_{\mathrm{cut}} [undefined] in thm:cut-corner-exactness — add a definitionv for the cut design P_{\mathrm{cut}} and reference it from thm:cut-corner-exactness
P_{\mathrm{iid}} [undefined] in thm:robust-corner-exactness — add a definitionv for the iid fair-sign design P_{\mathrm{iid}} and reference it from thm:robust-corner-exactness
X_{\mathrm{spread}} [undefined] in thm:gap-window — add a definitionv for the spread covariance, including its spectral coordinates, and reference it from thm:gap-window

T_m [undefined] in thm:sharp-rho-star/lem:cut-vertex-certificate/lem:spread-vertex-certificate/lem:frobenius-center-certificate/lem:rounding-gap-reduction — promote the reduced simplex T_m to a single definitionv and replace repeated local definitions and later bare uses with references to it

\phi_{r,\kappa} [undefined] in thm:sharp-rho-star/lem:frobenius-center-certificate/lem:rounding-gap-reduction — add a single anchored definition of the reduced objective \phi_{r,\kappa} and reference it from thm:sharp-rho-star, lem:frobenius-center-certificate, and lem:rounding-gap-reduction

d_m [undefined] in thm:sharp-rho-star/lem:pm-reduced-slice-characterization/lem:rounding-gap-reduction — add an anchored definition of the parity truncation d_m and reference it from every theorem or lemma that uses it
\rho_\star [undefined] in thm:sharp-rho-star — add a definitionv for the sharp rounding loss \rho_\star before thm:sharp-rho-star, or make thm:sharp-rho-star explicitly define it
admissible [undefined] in thm:sharp-rho-star — define the active-set admissibility predicate for (S,\lambda) in an anchored environment and reference it from the active-set formula
t^{S,\lambda} [undefined] in thm:sharp-rho-star — define the active-set point t^{S,\lambda} by formula in an anchored environment and reference it from thm:sharp-rho-star

\Phi_{\alpha^\sharp,\beta^\sharp,\kappa} [mismatch] in thm:sharp-rho-star — either define the parameterized weighted-simplex objective \Phi_{\alpha,\beta,\kappa} in an anchored environment or rewrite the theorem to instantiate the already-defined \Phi(t) notation explicitly

\operatorname{truncSelector} [undefined] in thm:sharp-rho-star — add a definitionv for \operatorname{truncSelector}(M,d,\alpha,\beta,\kappa) with its endpoint/interior formula and reference it from thm:sharp-rho-star
